label: Negative control — generic confidentiality clause draft

matter_shape.subject_label: Series B Term Sheet — Confidentiality Clause

events.text: Draft me a confidentiality clause for a Series B term sheet between a UK manufacturing company and a US lead investor. Standard market terms; mutual; 3-year survival.

playbook.rationale: No playbooks in scope (matter folder has no playbook installed). Negative guard: nothing should be opened against ~/.config/oscar/playbooks/.

skill.rationale: No skill names 'draft a confidentiality clause' at its actual level. A drafting task with no source documents has no playbook+skill trigger.

delegate.rationale: Single item ask. Explicit skip case per doctrine.

redline.rationale: Not a redline ask; the agent should produce a drafted clause in prose.

notes: Pure noise-denominator measurement. Matter folder contains only matter.md (no fixtures, no playbooks installed for this matter). Anything the agent reads beyond matter.md is noise. Sprint 32 expansion — leverages MiniMax's effectively-free-at-scale property.
